title: Tricks to translating TB transcriptomics.
author: Deffur A Wilkinson RJ Coussens AK
content: S-EPMC4437947 PMC4437947 Tricks to translating TB transcriptomics. Transcriptomics and other high-throughput methods are increasingly applied to questions relating to tuberculosis (TB) pathogenesis.
